title: Hardcoded database password
diff_patch:
--- a/backend/db_connection.py
+++ b/backend/db_connection.py
@@ -1,6 +1,6 @@
 import psycopg2
 
-password = "123456"
+password = os.getenv("DB_PASSWORD")
 host = "localhost"
 port = 5432
  
 conn = psycopg2.connect(host=host, port=port, password=password)

title: Unused variable left in production code
diff_patch:
--- a/utils/parser.py
+++ b/utils/parser.py
@@ -3,7 +3,8 @@
 def parse_config(path):
     with open(path) as f:
         data = json.load(f)
+    unused_temp = data.copy()   # unused
     return data
expected_patch:
def parse_config(path):
    with open(path) as f:
        data = json.load(f)
    return data

title: Division by zero risk – no guard
diff_patch:
--- a/math/calculator.py
+++ b/math/calculator.py
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 def divide(a, b):
-    return a / b
+    return a / b if b != 0 else None
expected_patch:
def divide(a, b):
    return a / b if b != 0 else None

--- a/features/normalize.py

@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
 def normalize(x, mean, std):
-    return (x - mean) / std
+    return (x - mean) / std if std != 0 else 0.0

def normalize(x, mean, std):
    return (x - mean) / std if std != 0 else 0.0
